docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KERR,CRAIG AS TO DEFENDANT TOSHIBA AMERICA CONSUMER PRODUCTS, INC. VIDEO ONLY, INC ASTRY, PAUL DBA SIERRA TV ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST BY DEFT TO KEEP EXHIBITS 1 YR FILED

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERITIFIED MAILING TO TOSHIBA AMERICA CONSUMER PRODUCUTS RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-13-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-18-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUANCE IS FOR PLTF TO SERVE VIDEO ONLY, INC. AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KERR,CRAIG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOSHIBA AMERICA CONSUMER PRODUCTS, INC. ASTRY, PAUL DBA SIERRA TV $2,550.00 PRINCIPAL, $72.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,622.00, VIDEO ONLY INC. IS DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE. JUDG- MENT IS AGAINST TOSHIBA AMERICA CONSUMER PRODUCTS, INC. IN THE AMOUNT OF $1800 & AGAINST PAUL ASTRY DBA SIERRA TV IN THE AMOUNT OF $750.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDANCE FROM TOSHIBA REQUESTING FOR A CONTINUANCE. COURT DATE SET FOR 12/18/01.
